title: Xtra Crispy Welsh Lamb Scotch Egg
description: A crispy and flavorful Welsh lamb scotch egg wrapped in a banana leaf, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This dish features a sugar syrup glaze and a mantecare-emulsified sauce.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the lamb mince, sugar syrup, salt, and black pepper until just combined.
Divide the lamb mixture into 4 equal parts and shape each part into a patty.
Wrap each patty around a hard-boiled egg, making sure to seal the edges well.
Wrap each scotch egg in a banana leaf, securing with a toothpick if necessary.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and fry the scotch eggs until golden brown on all sides.
Transfer the scotch eggs to a baking sheet and bake in the preheated oven for 15 minutes.
While the scotch eggs are baking, melt the manteca in a small saucepan over low heat and whisk in a little water to emulsify.
Remove the scotch eggs from the oven and brush with the manteca emulsion.
Serve the scotch eggs hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
